name: Jiangsu Xinning Modern Logistics Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Xinning Modern Logistics Co.,Ltd provides supply chain management services in China. The company offers warehousing services, including bonded warehousing and general storage; and freight services, such as air, maritime, land, and multimodal, as well as customs services. It also provides base wine packaging, warehousing, logistics, distribution, and other services; cross-border e-commerce services; and new energy car rental services. In addition, the company offers national satellite positioning, software development, and specialized hardware customization services; and car networking solutions comprising transportation industry supervision platform, general fleet management system, and comprehensive traffic information service system. Jiangsu Xinning Modern Logistics Co.,Ltd was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kunshan, China.
